reviews.text: Athena has been working on this app. it is getting better
horrible

Read only. Unable to place orders. Useless for physicians with an android. Unable to use ambient notes with Android version. Have an iPhone and it's definitely better suited for people with iPhone. Not so much to android users, which is a shame. [Edit] Close to 6 months from my last post. Still no changes. Their PR answered with generic "we're working on it".
not useful. unable to chart can only review schedule/review pt information.
I am unable to add a . to my login username.

As many other users have already commented, this is really only useful for chart review and checking their schedule. Productivity wise, not useful at all considering there is no way to document, bill or sign off on encounters. With all the notes that modern providers are perpetually swimming in, the Android versions of this app is risibly lacking.
inconvenient

currently, when you log on, it tells you that there is an update. when you go to the Google Play store, there is no update option. if you delete the app and reinstall it, it still tells you that there's an update. there doesn't appear to be a real effort by Athena to truly create a high-end EMR app for the desktop. as everyone else has said, it's good if you need to know who's on the list to see today. it's garbage when it comes to looking up lab results.
If I can't make appointments with the app it is mostly useless.
can someone tell me when will Android version get better. this version is worthless if its to see only IPhone version is what we need here please

Was promised an app for five years. I guess they delivered ..... an app that is basically only good for checking my schedule (which is at least SOMETHING). Android has always been the red headed stepchild of Athena so I guess I shouldn't complain ... at least there IS an "app" for Athena Android users.

For a company with this size and lack of ability to make an app that can do the same thing that iOS does is a complete disgrace. Just hire some qualified programmers to have this done. Remember there are more Android users in the world than iOS users.
from the start they overpromised and under delivered in basically every area.
Shame that Android is ignored when there's more of us.
shame that I can't send medications like the app on iOS. This just feels like a waste of I have to open my laptop every time I need to actually do something in the chart
This app is completely worthless on an Android device. Silly since Android holds 75% of market share worldwide.
It helps.
its read only. ypu cannot chart

When will this app be updated to do all the things the IOS version does? On the Android version you can only view past visits. As a provider, I need to be able to place orders and respond to messages. We also use AI for scribing and I have to carry around a separate IPad to record the visits since I do not have the feature on my phone.
Needs to be able to document notes like you guys have setup for iOS users.

Almost useless App for physician. Can't place any order. Can't review all labs of one patient easily on one screen. after being in business for so many years, it is unbelievable that Athena still has such primitive app for provider. If known earlier, I likely would not have decided to go with Athena. They just focused on Aesthetics.
This app brings little real value to my practice. I can't reply to portal messages, I can't refill prescriptions, I can't dictate notes. I can check my schedule. That is worth one 🌟
read only app. no utilities. my partner in the office has the app on his iPhone and it seems much more usable and user friendly.
add capabilities that you gave to the iOS app. it's dumb in 2025 to have such drastically different experiences...
can't really do or see important information i need.
Not user friendly for patients. This app is for providers only. Provider's staff ,when asked for help, was mansplaner and listening.
Where is the patient's portal for the Athena app?
useless unless you can complete tasks such as reply message, refill prescriptions and edit notes.
just out of the clear, not compatible with my device!
The app worked fine until it was no longer supported on my device one day. No warning, just told me it was no longer supported.

As others have said, this app is a disgrace. It is READ ONLY and doesn't allow you to perform any tasks at all. Athena keeps responding to reviews telling us to "share our thoughts on the success community" but people have been begging on the success community for a usable android app since 2017! They also claimed more functions would be added to the Android app by April 2025 and obviously that didn't happen. To continously alienate such a large segment of your paying user base is unacceptable.
Not that it was of much use anyway but now it's telling me my device is no longer compatible with the app. I'm running Android 10.
This app as it is now is almost useless. You can't send orders, prescriptions, make a patient case, chart etc. The only thing you can do is see your schedule and basic patient chart info.
it is a view only app. can not do patient case, orders, refills on medication.
fantastic orthopedics.. I'm a patient of Dr Agarwal and I've been with her for Over 5 years. and truly appreciate her. ☺️💯☺️

I just bought a new Android tablet for managing my athenaone inbox thinking it would work in an identical fashion to the iOS version of the app only to find out today that the Android version is VIEW ONLY. what's with the hold up? they said updated, editable version was due to come out in APRIL 2025.

Essentially a read-only access to chart info. Inbox items pop up as "need to view this on desktop." No ability to place orders, clear inbox items, make patient cases, document anything, etc. Might as well use desktop mode on your mobile browser...

I'm confused. Does this app do anything besides let you view information? That seems to be all the app does. My understanding is that the IOS app has significantly more functionality. In my opinion this app was released before it was ready as it adds very little in terms of utility.

Absolutely horrible and nonfunctional on Android. I have been with Athena for 10yrs, moved to another EMR for 3yrs, and returned to Athena. Athena has made no sincere effort to integrate on Android. My other EMR is flawless on Android. I agree with other reviews. My group pays Athena around $13,000/month. We are small but not voiceless. We use multiple operating systems: Mac OS, iOS, Android, and PC. Time for Athena to listen to its customers or become obsolete and be replaced by progress

First, they take multiple years to create the Android version and then when they finally do produce the Android version, it is severely limited and has none of the functionality of the iOS version. What good is seeing my patient cases if I can't respond to them?
good
This app is not for patients, then write that in the title between brackets

Doesn't work

It seems to be a waste of time and effort to go to a site like this portal to get information that you should be able to get directly by email. I can't see the advantage of it I'm not able to share this information with other doctors so what's the purpose

Compared to the iPhone version this app is useless. If I wanted to look up pt info, that's about all I can do. No copy a pt's phone number to dial in doximity. No prescribing, ordering or even adding info to an open pt case. Many areas say use AthenaDesktop ...why even use the app? I opened a support case w/ Athena, they advised me to update the app and make sure I'm using Android 9 or higher. Yes I am. I'm just so surprised this app is so low functioning. I might keep my iphone
Can't document in encounters through the app? So this is pretty much useless
Need to be able to answer cases and copy patient info

What an absolute piece of work. I use it mainly to check out my schedule but it logs you out in 2 seconds if the app is not being used. The login process it's not much easier than using the website and requires no less than three or four taps, not supporting biometrics.

Please God, can we have the ability to take screenshots of the app. I can log on a computer and I can take a picture of the screen. There's no reason I shouldn't be able to screenshot a finding or a lab result or something else so that I can send it to a patient or another colleague. It is immensely frustrating that this is forcibly disabled and there's no way to fix it.
Have beta. Florida, android. Will not login. Pending permission?
Fast!

Would be nice if it automatically switched practices entering the chart of a patient who is in a different practice/department than the one you are currently in. current behavior is if you're in the wrong practice it shows the patient in search but then says the specified patient does not exist in that department. Not sure what purpose this behavior serves.
My request was pending for more than 2 months but now it's working!
I tried to submit my practice but it has been in "Requested" and pending for about 3 weeks. Cannot go any further.
It only seems to work in VA. I work in Florida and it won't let me change the practice to anything else. My colleagues use this app on iPhone without issue, very frustrating

latest update sucks. they added a feature where you center the card inside a frame and it cuts off most of the bottom of the card image, no matter what backdrop I use or how much of the card I get in the frame. I zoom out and give it ample space to get the whole card in the shot and it still cuts off the bottom half of it. please remove this stupid update.

I purchased a new Android phone for work specifically to use this app with their system. No, it was not the cheapest phone. My old Android was incompatible due to the old operating system. This app works like a charm at times and it also fails to work properly frequently. I am rebooting the phone around every three documents, sometimes with every document as it will lock up and not allow me to close the app. This happens more when I try to add more than one document at a time. It will also upload the document properly but when I click "OK" acknowledging the upload was done, it again locks up and I must reboot the phone. Everyone at work has an Apple and state they have none of these issues. I do not know if this is a software or hardware issue but it is wasting a lot of my work time. I must use it due to work but otherwise I would not recommend it with an Android phone.

reviews.text: If you know what this app is for, it's great for kids and adults. If the user currently thinks Sesame Street is for babies, as kids will do at times, try a different app. As an adult, I use it to ground myself when I'm overwhelmed. It's simple and gives you something to focus on. I think it's a great tool to develop emotional regulation and intelligence. Teaches: - physical cues of negative emotions - how to pause and assess - how to break down a problem and work on a solution - empathy

reviews.text: I have a 5 yr old Aspergers/ADHD son who is prone to tantrums and hitting I am giving this 4 stars because he seems to enjoy this app over similar (more highly rated) apps. Unfortunately, it has very few examples, and often suggests solutions either not typically available or encourages a child to have someone else do the task. However, it does provide a good simple "model" he has memorized, so we can play-act being the monster and pop imaginary bubbles when he needs to deal w/real situations.

reviews.text: I love this app so much and so does my two year old. You are presented with a cute monster who faces an emotion like frustration, fear, sadness and then, you help him breathe. After that, you pop bubbles and think of ways to handle your problem. You are presented with three choices for your child to pick to solve the issue and then they play out the scene. There is also an option to personalize the app with your voice for your child.

reviews.text: My niece would get frustrated very easily. but after playing this for a while and sitting with her while she played it I am able to remind her as soon as she starts getting upset to breathe and think of a plan. It has really help the length of her emotional outbursts. And has helped her be more resolution oriented rather than problem oriented. I have not had any freezing problems like others have mentioned but hopefully they fix that because this app has been really helpful.
